# Case export-type: Step 1

## Changed Files
- imported.css

## Asset Files
- Bundle: bundle.js
- Bundle: hi_txt.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Bundle: stylesheet_css.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 45
- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 397
- Update: stylesheet_css.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 344

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main","stylesheet_css"],"r":[],"m":[]}
```


## Update


### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./imported.css?6c24

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {
"./imported.css?6c24"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = {
	"default": ".imported-class-updated {\n\tcolor: purple;\n\tfont-style: italic;\n}\n"
});


},

},function(__webpack_require__) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__webpack_require__.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```



### stylesheet_css.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./imported.css?4c2a

#### Changed Runtime Modules


#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("stylesheet_css", {
"./imported.css?4c2a"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
var __css_style_sheet = __webpack_require__.css(".imported-class-updated {\n\tcolor: purple;\n\tfont-style: italic;\n}\n");
__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = {
	"default": __css_style_sheet
});


},

});
```
